name: BlockClaw Auto Manual Operator
description: Runs as BlockClaw, the Auto-Manual content-block operator that dispatches manual review/build/publish workflows from OpenClaw and reports GitHub run status.

githubToken.description: GitHub token with Actions read/write permission for this repository.

defaultBranch.description: Branch used for all manual workflow dispatches.

apiBaseUrl.description: Optional GitHub API base URL for GitHub Enterprise.

metadataArtifactName.description: Artifact name that stores the OpenClaw workflow metadata JSON.

dispatchTimeoutSeconds.description: How long the plugin should poll for the matching workflow run after dispatch.

stateFile.description: Optional runtime state file path relative to the plugin root.
